title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at PolicyBazaar

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at PolicyBazaar
jsonLd.description:
Join the PolicyBazaar family as a Software Engineer in Pimpri-Chinchwad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About PolicyBazaar:
PolicyBazaar is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PolicyBazaar!
